# Papilov Research

> Personal research site by Artem Papilov. Open research at the intersection
> of technology, economics, and human behavior. 15 years of product and adtech
> experience (Yandex scale). All research is AI-co-authored with Claude (Anthropic),
> openly licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.

Research is published in English, Russian, Spanish, German, and Chinese.
The site focuses on data-driven analysis with original frameworks and visualizations.

## Research Articles

- [The Price of Loyalty — Subscription Pricing Models](https://papilov.org/research/subscription-pricing-models/): Why Netflix raises prices every year while World of Warcraft hasn't in 21 years. Analysis of three pricing archetypes: Extractive, Gateway, and Monopoly. Covers behavioral economics of subscription inertia, loss aversion, and boiling frog pricing.

## About

- [About & Contact](https://papilov.org/): Product practitioner with 15 years in adtech, publishing open research.
- [Colophon](https://papilov.org/colophon/): How this site is built, AI disclosure, and licensing details.
- [Work With Me](https://papilov.org/work-with-me/): Consulting services in adtech, programmatic advertising, and digital monetization.

## Optional

- [Russian version](https://papilov.org/ru/): Full site in Russian.
- [Spanish version](https://papilov.org/es/): Full site in Spanish.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/a-pap/papilov.org): Source code for this site (MIT license).
